name: Gemersik Berbisik
overview: The story of the journey of Tasya (Elisya Sandha), Daniel (Wan Zarul Imran) and Kimi (Ezzrin Loy) in studying folk songs - Jong Jong Inai, Ulek Mayang, Tepuk Amai Amai & Buai Laju-Laju until they are forced to get involved in solving a haunting mystery them.
